description_long: This is a medium-sized, round apple with a smooth, slightly glossy red skin and subtle speckles. A brown stem protrudes from the top, accompanied by a single green leaf that is attached and slightly curled. One side of the apple has a large, irregular bite taken out, revealing the pale, moist, and fibrous interior flesh. The apple's surface is mostly unblemished, with a natural gradient of red hues and a hint of yellow undertones. The overall shape is slightly asymmetrical, with a gentle bulge on one side. The apple appears fresh and juicy, suitable for eating or display in an urban park or street setting.
description: A red apple with a green leaf and a large bite taken out, revealing its pale interior.
description_view_0: Red apple with stem and green leaf, unbitten side visible.
description_view_1: Large bite missing, exposing pale interior flesh and leaf visible.
description_view_2: Red apple with stem and leaf, bite mark partially visible on left.
description_view_3: Top-down view showing stem, leaf, and mostly intact red skin.
attribute_visible_damage_or_blemishes: large bite taken out, no other damage
